title: Single record view transposed
excerpt: Hi. There doesn’t seem to be a way to generate a report / summary view of a record. For example, if a record has 12 columns, and I want to collect 6 of those columns into a one page view, like a report, is there a way to…

posts.author: TempletonFerrari (Joe Public)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. There doesn’t seem to be a way to generate a report / summary view of a record. For example, if a record has 12 columns, and I want to collect 6 of those columns into a one page view, like a report, is there a way to do this?

Records are horizontal, and I would like to transpose a single record so it’s on a single view vertically. I thought I would see a way to do this in the blank view, but I don’t. The only alternative I can think of is to create an email automation.

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @TempletonFerrari,

Have you tried working with Item Card views yet?

Open an item on a board, and you’ll notice at the top off to the side a little ’ +’ you can use to add different views to your item. This view type lets you customise the information you’re seeing and is easier on the eye for some.

Give us a shout if you get stuck!
teameasy@easy-mondays.com

posts.author: TempletonFerrari (Joe Public)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for the suggestion. It’s not perfect, but I may be able to work with it.

posts.author: shayan.moussawi (Shayan Moussawi)
posts.cookedHtml: Also as advice: You can use multiple colors item cards displaying different information
